hero_title_main: Your team can study more English.
hero_title_accent: Or they can use what they have.
hero_subtitle: Speexify is the practice ground for teams whose meetings, pitches, and client calls actually matter. One coach at a time. Real conversations, not e-learning. Monthly reporting your leadership will read.
hero_image_alt: A team practicing live with a coach
logos_title: For teams whose conversations decide something.
metric1_label: of teams report a shift in stakeholder confidence
programs_title: Three ways to practice. One outcome.
programs_subtitle: Mix what fits. Most teams do.
program1_p2: The exact scenarios that decide their week
program1_p3: Built on their real meetings, not case studies
plan1_desc: A small cohort. Before-and-after measures. A clear answer before you commit further.
plan2_desc: The full practice ground. 1:1, group, workshops. Monthly reporting your leadership can act on.
plan2_b2: Workshops on the moments that matter
plan2_b3: A view that managers actually read
plan3_desc: Full rollout. A success manager you'll know by name. Executive reporting. Compliance, sorted.
plan3_b2: A success manager who knows your team
reporting_title: Reporting your CEO will actually read.
reporting_subtitle: Monthly summaries. Attendance. Real milestones. The things that show up in a QBR — not the things that fill a streak counter. SSO and roster sync if you need them.
reporting_proof_2: Risk flags you can act on
testis_subtitle: Quiet shifts that changed something measurable.
testi1_quote: Our CS team used to schedule renewal calls around the most senior person available. Now they run them themselves. We saw it on the calls before we saw it in the numbers — but the numbers came too.
testi2_quote: Our engineers can build anything. What they couldn't do was explain it to non-technical stakeholders without flinching. The workshops shifted that. The 1:1s held it in place.
testi3_quote: I expected to make the case to leadership for the rollout. The reporting made the case for me.
rfp_subtitle: We'll come back with a plan, a coach mix, and a sample report. Within a business day.
rfp_aside_b1: We reply within a business day
rfp_aside_b3: Security and roster questions handled upfront
field_timeframe: When are you looking to start?
placeholder_goals: e.g., the meetings, calls, or moments that matter most
placeholder_notes: Optional — anything else you want us to know
status_required: Please fill in the required fields.
status_sent: You're in. We'll be back within a business day with a plan.
status_email_fallback: Opened your email client. If that didn't work, email hello@speexify.com.
cta_title: Your team already has the language. We give them somewhere to use it.
cta_subtitle: The teams that practice this stop saying 'sorry, can you repeat that?' in meetings. Their stakeholders notice first. Their numbers follow.
fomo_urgency: The companies that invest in this don't talk about it. They just keep showing up in meetings that decide things.
fomo_roi_scarcity: A small number of new teams onboarded each quarter.
